Draft Advisor {{SEASON}}
Model-powered fantasy draft rankings
▲ Sleeper — model projects more value than their draft rank suggests ▼ FADE — model projects less value than their draft rank suggests vs Experts — positive = undervalued, negative = overvalued Above Repl. — points above a freely available player at same position Season PPR — expected full-season PPR fantasy points
Projections from walk-forward ML models trained on 2006–{{PREV_SEASON}} NFL data. Not financial advice.
